subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is not a Rajasthan royal family?
question_hi: निम्नलेखित केवल राजस्थान के भूत पत्तियों के विभाग नहीं है।
explanation_en: Jaisalmer Rajput family belongs to the Jaisalmer region and not a specific royal family.

subject: Rajasthan History
